name: Magic Tiny Lands
short_description: Magic Tin Lands is an action-platformer where a small knight travels through a mystical forest to defeat the evil unleashed by a magical monolith.
detailed_description:
In Magic Tin Lands, you play as a knight embarking on a dangerous journey through the forest to eradicate the evil spread by a broken monolith. Collect new abilities and battle enemies while overcoming traps.

Key Features:

Action-platformer with exploration elements.

A mystical forest filled with enemies and traps.

A variety of weapons and abilities, including a sword and bow.

An engaging story with gradual ability progression.

A vibrant and immersive world with dynamic gameplay.
